case_title: MARIE C. HENDERSON VS. JOHN STRICKLIN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STRICKLIN, JOHN
**AS TO THE DEFENDANT:HOFFINGER DEANNA ONLY*** DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE - FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, MARIE C. AS TO DEFENDANT HOFFINGER, DEANNA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, MARIE C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STRICKLIN, JOHN $600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00, AN EMPLOYER IS REQUIRED TO PAY AN EMPLOYEE IMMEDIATELY UPON TERMINATION. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS CONTINUATION OF PLAINTIFF'S WAGES UNTIL PAID BY DEFENDANT ON DECEMBER 7, 2009, PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE SECTION 203. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STRICKLIN, JOHN
